summary: Native ext 5.5-6.0x vs ctypes 7.5-7.9x. Gap = 0.002ms (PyTorch dispatch). Graph-captured ctypes not bit-exact (stream issue).
conclusion: Native ext overhead is only 0.002ms (20%) vs ctypes. Main overhead is stream lookup (0.0073ms) which is unavoidable for graph safety. ctypes with prealloc+cached stream = 7.5x, same as raw ctypes.
